constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new normal, lozenge, bulged or rounded Layout::Rectangle, depending on the type passed in. The rectangle type can be one of the following values: Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_NORMAL Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_ROUNDED Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_LOZENGE Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_BULGED
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new normal, lozenge, bulged or rounded Layout::Rectangle, depending on the type passed in. The rectangle type can be one of the following values: Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_NORMAL Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_ROUNDED Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_LOZENGE Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_BULGED

throws.when: if type passed in does not match the number of arguments
if type is not a valid type
if radius is a negative value

properties.name: radius
properties.summary: The #radius method returns the radius of the Layout::Rectangle, or nil if the Layout::Rectangle is not of type Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_BULGED or Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_ROUNDED
properties.remarks: The #radius method returns the radius of the Layout::Rectangle, or nil if the Layout::Rectangle is not of type Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_BULGED or Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_ROUNDED

properties.name: type
properties.summary: The #type method returns the type of the Layout::Rectangle.
properties.remarks: The #type method returns the type of the Layout::Rectangle. The type of a rectangle can be one of the following: Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_NORMAL Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_ROUNDED Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_LOZENGE Layout::Rectangle::TYPE_BULGED
